nasb.text: The gaiety of tambourines ceases, The noise of revelers stops, The gaiety of the harp ceases.

esv.text: The mirth of the tambourines is stilled, the noise of the jubilant has ceased, the mirth of the lyre is stilled.

cnv.text: 擊鼓的喜樂止息， 宴樂者的喧嘩停止， 彈琴的喜樂也止息了。

ccb.text: 欢快的鼓声止息， 悦耳的琴音消失， 宴乐的喧闹不复听闻。

csbs.text: 欢快的鼓声止息， 欢腾者的喧嚷停止， 欢快的琴声也止息了。
